title: meliosma lepidota subsp. squamulata
intro: Meliosma lepidota subsp. squamulata, also known as Meliosma squamulata, is a species of flowering plant in the family Alangiaceae. It is a shrub native to the Philippines and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and its extracts have shown potential in reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. In herbal medicine, Meliosma squamulata is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and roots are used to make teas, tinctures, and other medicinal preparations.
